name: afa-football-analyzer
displayName: ⚽ AFA 足球量化分析引擎
description: 竞彩足球+北京单场12玩法全覆盖 · 25个MCP工具 · AI原生推理 · 15.9万场历史数据校准
author: AFA Team

tools.name: think_match
tools.description: AI原生：比赛全维思考(ELO+Kelly+赔率+叙事+联赛因子)

tools.name: half_full_analyzer
tools.description: 半全场胜平负9选项概率(竞彩+北单)

tools.name: win_loss_analyzer
tools.description: 北单胜负过关分析(15关串关)

tools.name: official_knowledge
tools.description: 官方规则知识库：12种玩法/返奖率/封顶/阈值

tools.name: match_narrative_analyzer
tools.description: AI原生：读懂比赛叙事(德比/保级/连胜动量)

tools.name: market_signal_analyzer
tools.description: AI原生：解读赔率背后的市场心理

tools.name: elo_calculate
tools.description: ELO评分计算与赛后更新

tools.name: dixon_coles_predict
tools.description: Dixon-Coles双变量泊松比分预测

tools.name: kelly_analyze
tools.description: Kelly公式·竞彩/北单阈值自动区分

tools.name: score_probability_matrix
tools.description: 完整比分概率矩阵+总进球+上下单双

tools.name: monte_carlo_simulator
tools.description: 蒙特卡洛5000次模拟

tools.name: mxn_calculator
tools.description: M串N组合+奖金(含封顶扣税)

tools.name: parlay_optimizer
tools.description: 智能串关推荐(2串1到N串1)

tools.name: smart_bet_selector
tools.description: 价值投注筛选+EV排序

tools.name: scrape_500_jczq
tools.description: 500.com竞彩实时SP爬取→结构化JSON

tools.name: scrape_500_beidan
tools.description: 500.com北京单场实时SP爬取→结构化JSON

tools.name: beidan_sxds_analyzer
tools.description: 北单上下单双+联赛因子修正

tools.name: evolution_status
tools.description: 进化引擎状态(129次回测)

tools.name: odds_calibration_lookup
tools.description: 赔率→实测胜率校准(8.9万场)

tools.name: get_team_elo
tools.description: ELO数据库查询(中英文模糊匹配)

tools.name: get_league_factor
tools.description: 联赛量化因子(15.9万场实测)

tools.name: bankroll_calculator
tools.description: 资金管理(风险等级/单日上限)

tools.name: odds_implied_probabilities
tools.description: 欧赔→市场隐含概率

tools.name: comprehensive_match_analysis
tools.description: 一键综合：ELO+赔率+Kelly

tools.name: evolution_feedback
tools.description: 赛后复盘反馈+权重调整建议
